name: Al Di Meola
abstract: Albert Laurence Di Meola (born July 22, 1954) is an American guitarist. Known for his work in jazz fusion and world music, he had his breakthrough after joining Chick Corea's Return to Forever group in 1974.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Chick Corea and Return to Forever and Gato Barbieri Ensemble
